chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1485 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.5845/2022 2. For hearing of main case 15-08-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner in CP No.D-1485/2022 submits that in so far as his grievance is concerned, it has been redressed and therefore, he does not press this petition. However, since his petition was taken up along with two other petitions viz. CP No.D-42 /2023 and CP No. D-123/2023, they may be detagged. In view of above the two petitions are detagged and separated from CP No.D-1485/2022, which in the light of statement of learned counsel for the petitioner, is allowed to be withdrawn and accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
